recurringPattern: Stacked centered hero with gradient-background headline, pill-shaped CTA button, and floating mockup device frame (laptop/mobile) angled from bottom-right.
designHarm: Monotonous page entry; every AI-generated marketing page opens the same way, burying differentiation. Users develop banner-blindness for this exact composition.
legitimateExceptions: Landing pages for template-driven SaaS where the hero is intentionally a known pattern to reduce cognitive friction
Product demo sites where the device frame is the actual product (screenshot inside)
possibleFixtures: Centered AI-hero with gradient headline and angled laptop mockup
Hero that breaks the pattern with asymmetric layout and no device frame
originalObservations: Observed across 12+ AI-generated landing page examples: always a centered headline using a gradient, a single pill CTA, and a floating laptop/phone mockup angled ~15 degrees.
The device frame typically contains a blurred UI screenshot or a generic dashboard image.
